title: Who Killed The Plot
description: Who killed the plot? Well, it was definitely one of us... but can you figure out who? Join us for a hilariously unpredictable improvised murder mystery with a twist! Watch as a cast of quick-thinking improvisers blend the best of short-form chaos like lines from a hat and Party Quirks, with the intrigue of a long-form whodunit. Expect wild characters, ridiculous twists, and plenty of unscripted moments. Will we solve the crime, or just make things even more absurd? There's only one way to find out, come see the mystery (and the madness) unfold!
content_warnings: The show is improvised, but there will be at least one murder
